jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at NABARD
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
